summary: A short tribute montage. It opens on a black screen with white text giving two names, Brady Heiling and Hallie Helgeson, and the line Killed by a drunk illegal. The montage then shows personal photographs of a young man and a young woman together and individually, with a small inset in the lower left of a woman speaking at a congressional hearing table labeled Ms. Heiling.

script.scene: Black screen with white text giving two names and the line Killed by a drunk illegal.
A personal photo of a young man and woman together; a small inset shows a woman at a congressional hearing table labeled Ms. Heiling.
A personal photo of the young woman; the hearing inset remains in the lower left.

notable_text: Brady Heiling & Hallie Helgeson; Killed by a drunk illegal; Ms. Heiling
